## Change Summary

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] chore: Build/tooling
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] ci: CI/CD
- [ ] perf: Performance
- [ ] style: Code style

## Checklist
- [ ] Architecture rules followed (no Domain -> Infrastructure imports)
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check src/`)
